title: R.A.W (Robots and Wings)
subtitle: Line-Following Robot Challenge and Drone Obstacle Course combining robotics and aerodynamics
description: R.A.W (Robots and Wings) combined creativity and technical skills by engaging participants in two thrilling competitions: a Line-Following Robot Challenge and a Drone Obstacle Course. Organized jointly by BVP Optica and TechInnovate, this event aimed to foster practical understanding of robotics, aerodynamics, and embedded systems, while promoting teamwork, innovation, and problem-solving in real-world engineering applications.
location: B302, B402, College Ground, Basketball Court
highlights: Line-Following Robot Challenge for autonomous navigation
Drone Obstacle Course for flight control mastery
Hands-on experience in sensor calibration and microcontroller programming
Joint collaboration between BVP Optica and TechInnovate
